hooks.command: if [ -d .crabcc ]; then crabcc index --refresh >/dev/null 2>&1; else echo 'crabcc: no index in this repo (run /crabcc-init)' >&2; fi

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '(^| )(rg|grep( -[a-zA-Z]+)?)\s+[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]+|(^| )find\s+[^|]*-name\b' && echo 'hint: try `crabcc sym/refs/callers` — symbol-aware and ~10x cheaper on tokens (`crabcc --help` for the full surface)' >&2; exit 0
